arts.sum: Arsenal's Invincibles survived a last-minute scare when Ruud van Nistelrooy crashed his penalty off the crossbar before an infamous brawl with rival Martin Keown

arts.ttl: Leicester boss Ruud van Nistelrooy insists 'the game needs rivalries' as Man United icon plots Arsenal's downfall
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Ruud van Nistelrooy admits he relishes football's most bitter battles as he prepares to lock horns with Arsenal once again on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka 'set to miss another eight weeks of action' with Arsenal winger on schedule in his recovery from hamstring surgery
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is 'set to miss another eight weeks of action' for Arsenal as he continues his recovery from a serious hamstring injury. Saka, 23, suffered the injury on December 21 against Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: 'I know': What Pep Guardiola once said about Raheem Sterling playing as a striker is now very interesting

arts.sum: All the latest transfer news, gossip and rumours from Manchester United as Ruben Amorim looks to battle some of his Premier League rivals to sign a striker and a €90m star. Man Utd dealt HUGE financial blow over summer transfer plans

arts.ttl: Arsenal striker transfer search takes fresh twist as 'contact made' over £41.5m Man United target
arts.sum: The Atalanta striker, 25, is having a great season, despite the fact he missed a penalty against the Gunners in the Champions League, with 19 goals scored. Atalanta striker Mateo Retegui is reportedly on radar for Arsenal ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: What more could Mikel Arteta do? Arsenal manager facing scrutiny after Kai Havertz injury blow - Tom Canton
arts.sum: Arsenal failed to bring in a single player during the January transfer window and the only forward they signed in the summer after selling Eddie Nketiah and Emile Smith Rowe while also loaning out Reiss Nelson and Fabio Vieira was Raheem Sterling on loan. While there is an element of hindsight being 20/20, Mikel Arteta has hardly been quiet when it comes to public comments of how short his side are up top and the desire to sign a forward player.
